'''Mansom Corporation''' was a company based on [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]]. It was a construction contracting firm that specialized in the design and construction of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]-class [[Spaceport/Legends|starports]].

Mansom spent over a [[Standard century/Legends|century]] building a reputation as a provider of exclusive and unique designs, and usually committed to no more than six projects a decade. A Mansom contract was highly sought-after, and most applicants for Mansom designs were turned down.
